privileged_info_summary: The task auto_normalize@1 (version 1.0) uses GIMP to apply Auto Normalize to images from Unsplash. The task downloads images from two URLs (photo-1544198365-f5d60b6d8190 at 1000x667 pixels, 36.3 KB; photo-1487621167305-5d248087c724 at 1000x563 pixels, 12.5 KB) with JPEG quality q=30. However, contrary to the task description claiming 'low-contrast images,' analysis shows both actual images have moderate-to-high contrast: Image 1 has 96.5% dynamic range utilization with 66.2 standard deviation; Image 2 has 74.1% dynamic range utilization with 64.2 standard deviation. The verifier checks: (1) dynamic range expansion ≥20%, (2) contrast improvement ≥15%, (3) clipping <2%, (4) meaningful modification, requiring ≥3/4 criteria for 75% pass threshold. The task.json file does not contain an explicit 'metadata' field.
